ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. Certificate number SEG-26D-442744, issued 2026-01-26 by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. Invoice No. 921007391 dated 2026-01-12, issued by ARA Timber AB.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-442744' does not contain any LC banking-term label or separate LC field. Standard verification applies.

locations_found.location: Header/branding area: 'ARA TIMBER' logo and company name at top of invoice

pairing_validation.motivation: Criterion 2 met: Certifikatets consignor 'ARA Timber AB' kan identifieras i fakturan som fakturautställare (header/branding och footer). Criterion 3 met: Certifikatets consignee 'Company Bouchra Taibah For Trading (One Partner)' kan identifieras i fakturans Customer-fält. Parningsvalidering godkänd.

document_pair_note: The certificate file (Document A) contains the certificate on page 1 and a copy of the invoice on page 2. Per rule 8.5.0, the verification is performed against the invoice in the SEPARATE invoice file (Document B), not the embedded invoice copy in the certificate file. Both are identical in content.

consignor.certificate_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16 GÖTEBORG, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'ARA Timber AB' anywhere in invoice files.
comparison_steps.detail: The exact name 'ARA Timber AB' is found in the invoice footer company block (IV-002). Additionally 'ARA TIMBER' appears in the invoice header/branding (IV-001). The invoice is issued by ARA Timber AB.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor 'ARA Timber AB' matches invoice issuer 'ARA Timber AB' exactly after normalization.
Certificate states SWEDEN. Invoice footer address states 'Sweden'. VAT number 'SE556976003501' has SE prefix confirming Sweden. IBAN codes begin with SE.
Certificate country: SWEDEN. Invoice country: Sweden. After normalization (case): identical.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found directly in invoice.
Name verification – same juridical party identified.
Country verified via explicit address and VAT prefix SE.

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'ARA Timber AB' at 'Vallgatan 27, 411 16, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN'. The invoice is issued by 'ARA Timber AB' (header branding and footer). Footer address: 'Vallgatan 27, 411 16 GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. The name matches exactly. GOTHENBURG vs GÖTEBORG is the English vs Swedish spelling of the same city – this is an address variation, not a name mismatch. Country: SWEDEN in certificate vs Sweden in invoice footer – identical after case normalization. VAT No SE556976003501 confirms Sweden via SE prefix. All criteria met for MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Company Bouchra Taibah For Trading (One Partner), Abdullah Bin Wadiah 7064 Building Number Al Matar District 3772 42343 Madinah Saudi Arabia
consignee.invoice_value: Company Bouchra Taibah For Trading (One Partner), Abdullah Bin Wadiah 7064 Building Number Al Matar District 3772 42343 Madinah SAUDI ARABIA

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains a 'Customer' field (primary invoicing field). This is the authoritative consignee.
Certificate consignee: 'Company Bouchra Taibah For Trading (One Partner)'. Invoice Customer: 'Company Bouchra Taibah For Trading (One Partner)'. Exact match.
Certificate: 'Saudi Arabia'. Invoice: 'SAUDI ARABIA'. After case normalization: identical.

Certificate: 'Abdullah Bin Wadiah 7064 Building Number Al Matar District 3772 42343 Madinah'. Invoice: 'Abdullah Bin Wadiah 7064 Building Number Al Matar District 3772 42343 Madinah'. Address matches.

rules_applied.description: Priority order – Customer field is primary invoicing field.
Name verification – exact match after normalization.

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Company Bouchra Taibah For Trading (One Partner)' at address in Madinah, Saudi Arabia. Invoice Customer field states identical name and address. Country: 'Saudi Arabia' vs 'SAUDI ARABIA' – identical after case normalization. Full name and address match. MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value: REDWOOD (with Lot 2B, 2x40´HC Containers, 21 packages, Gross weight: 50 380 kgs)
goods_description.invoice_value: REDWOOD (with V 50x250, V 50x225; Lot 2B, 2x40'HC Containers, 21 packages / 88,842 cbm, Gross weight: 50 380 kgs)

comparison_steps.description: No article numbers are stated in the certificate. Proceeding to Priority 2 (textmatchning).
The identity-bearing main designation in the certificate is 'REDWOOD'. The invoice Description column states 'REDWOOD' as the product header. Exact match.

The certificate also mentions 'Lot 2B, 2x40´HC Containers, 21 packages, Gross weight: 50 380 kgs' in Box 6. The invoice contains identical shipping information: 'Lot 2B, 2x40'HC Containers, 21 packages / 88,842 cbm, Gross weight: 50 380 kgs'. These are non-identity-bearing additions (packaging/shipping details) that match. The invoice additionally provides line-level detail (V 50x250, V 50x225) which is additional information in the invoice not stated in the certificate – per section 2.1, this does not cause MISMATCH.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'REDWOOD' found exactly in invoice.
Non-identity-bearing additions (lot, containers, packages) also match. Additional detail in invoice (V 50x250, V 50x225) is additional information per 2.1.
Unilateral verification – additional detail in invoice does not cause MISMATCH.

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 6 states 'REDWOOD' as the goods description, along with shipping details (Lot 2B, 2x40´HC Containers, 21 packages, Gross weight: 50 380 kgs). The invoice lists 'REDWOOD' as the product heading, with line items V 50x250 (19.99 CBM) and V 50x225 (68.852 CBM), followed by a shipping summary 'Lot 2B, 2x40'HC Containers, 21 packages / 88,842 cbm, Gross weight: 50 380 kgs'. The identity-bearing main designation 'REDWOOD' matches exactly. The shipping details in the certificate are also present in the invoice. The invoice provides more granular product detail (size specifications) which the certificate does not list – this is additional information in the invoice and per section 2.1 does not cause MISMATCH. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '88,842 cbm'. This is the verification-grounding quantity. The certificate also states 'Gross weight: 50 380 kgs' in Box 6 – this is a secondary quantity.
Invoice shipping summary states '21 packages / 88,842 cbm'. The numeric value 88,842 (i.e. 88.842 with comma as decimal separator) matches exactly. Unit: cbm. MATCH.

Certificate Box 6 states 'Gross weight: 50 380 kgs'. Invoice shipping summary states 'Gross weight: 50 380 kgs'. Exact match of numeric value (50380) and unit (kgs) and category (Gross weight). No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity (88,842 cbm) is the verification-grounding quantity.
Förekomstkontroll – 88,842 cbm found exactly in invoice.
Secondary quantity (Gross weight 50 380 kgs) also verified – no contradiction.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7 states '88,842 cbm'. Invoice shipping summary states '88,842 cbm'. Using comma as decimal separator in both (European notation), the numeric value is 88.842. Exact match. Certificate Box 6 also states 'Gross weight: 50 380 kgs'. Invoice states 'Gross weight: 50 380 kgs'. The space in '50 380' is a thousands separator per rule 4.4.3.3 (both are integers with space as thousands separator). Numeric value: 50380. Exact match. Both quantities verified. No contradictions. MATCH.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Norway (Country of origin field); also 'MADE IN NORWAY' (Shipping Marks)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains a dedicated 'Country of origin' field stating 'Norway'. Additionally, Shipping Marks state 'MADE IN NORWAY'. Both are explicit origin designations.
Certificate: 'NORWAY'. Invoice: 'Norway'. After case normalization: identical.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in dedicated 'Country of origin' field in invoice.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 states 'NORWAY' as country of origin. The invoice has a dedicated 'Country of origin' field stating 'Norway'. Additionally, the Shipping Marks section states 'MADE IN NORWAY'. After case normalization, 'NORWAY' = 'Norway'. Note: The certificate header says 'EUROPEAN UNION' which is the framework of the certificate form itself (EU COO form), NOT the country of origin. The country of origin is explicitly stated in Box 3 as 'NORWAY'. Norway is not an EU member state, but this is irrelevant – the origin is what Box 3 states, and it matches the invoice. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The certificate header 'EUROPEAN UNION' might indicate EU origin
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: 'EUROPEAN UNION' in the certificate header is the title of the certificate form (EU Certificate of Origin), not a declaration of origin. The actual origin is in Box 3: NORWAY.

evidence.raw_text: REDWOOD, V 50x250 19,99 CBM, V 50x225 68,852 CBM; Lot 2B, 2x40'HC Containers, 21 packages / 88,842 cbm, Gross weight: 50 380 kgs

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No LC reference found in certificate.

Certificate file (Document A) contains certificate on page 1 and invoice copy on page 2. Invoice file (Document B) contains the separate invoice. Verification performed against Document B per rule 8.5.0.
Consignor 'ARA Timber AB' found in invoice (criterion 2 met). Consignee 'Company Bouchra Taibah For Trading (One Partner)' found in invoice Customer field (criterion 3 met).

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor search in all files
rule_evaluation_log.detail: 'ARA Timber AB' found in invoice header/branding and footer.
ARA Timber AB = ARA Timber AB
VAT prefix SE, explicit address 'Sweden', IBAN SE prefix.
Invoice 'Customer' field used as primary invoicing field.
Saudi Arabia = SAUDI ARABIA after case normalization.
Shipping details (Lot 2B, containers, packages, gross weight) match. Additional product detail in invoice (V 50x250, V 50x225) is additional information per 2.1.
88,842 cbm found in invoice shipping summary.
50 380 kgs GW in certificate = 50 380 kgs GW in invoice. No contradiction.
'Country of origin: Norway' explicit field in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändare (ARA Timber AB, Sverige), mottagare (Company Bouchra Taibah For Trading, Saudiarabien), varubeskrivning (Redwood), kvantitet (88,842 cbm och bruttovikt 50 380 kgs) samt ursprungsland (Norge) kan alla verifieras exakt mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning – certifikatets consignor identifieras som fakturautställare. Land verifierat via adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'ARA Timber AB' återfinns exakt som fakturautställare i fakturans sidfot och sidhuvud. Adress: Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Göteborg – GOTHENBURG/GÖTEBORG är den engelska resp. svenska formen av samma stad (adressvariation). Land: SWEDEN/Sweden – identiskt efter normalisering. VAT SE556976003501 bekräftar Sverige.

sections.invoice_value: Company Bouchra Taibah For Trading (One Partner), Abdullah Bin Wadiah 7064 Building Number Al Matar District 3772 42343 Madinah SAUDI ARABIA
sections.rule_applied: Exakt namnmatchning mot fakturans Customer-fält. Land verifierat.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'Company Bouchra Taibah For Trading (One Partner)' återfinns exakt i fakturans Customer-fält. Adress och postnummer överensstämmer. Land: Saudi Arabia/SAUDI ARABIA – identiskt efter normalisering.

sections.certificate_value: REDWOOD (Lot 2B, 2x40´HC Containers, 21 packages, Gross weight: 50 380 kgs)
sections.invoice_value: REDWOOD (V 50x250 19,99 CBM, V 50x225 68,852 CBM; Lot 2B, 2x40'HC Containers, 21 packages / 88,842 cbm, Gross weight: 50 380 kgs)
sections.rule_applied: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'REDWOOD' identifierad exakt i fakturan. Inga artikelnummer i certifikatet – textmatchning tillämpas.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'REDWOOD' återfinns exakt i fakturans varuspecifikation. Fraktinformation (Lot 2B, 2x40'HC Containers, 21 packages, Gross weight: 50 380 kgs) återfinns också i fakturan. Fakturan anger ytterligare detaljer per rad (V 50x250, V 50x225) som inte förekommer i certifikatet – detta är ytterligare information i fakturan och medför inte avvikelse enligt ensidig verifieringsprincip.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll – Box 7-värde 88,842 cbm identifierat exakt i fakturan. Sekundär kvantitet (bruttovikt) verifierad utan motsägelse.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets Box 7-kvantitet '88,842 cbm' återfinns exakt i fakturans leveranssammanfattning ('21 packages / 88,842 cbm'). Bruttovikt '50 380 kgs' (Box 6) matchar fakturans 'Gross weight: 50 380 kgs'. Båda kvantitetsuppgifterna verifierade utan avvikelse.

sections.rule_applied: Explicit ursprungsangivelse identifierad i fakturans dedikerade 'Country of origin'-fält.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'NORWAY' i Box 3. Fakturan anger 'Norway' i det dedikerade fältet 'Country of origin'. Dessutom anges 'MADE IN NORWAY' under Shipping Marks. Identiskt efter normalisering av versaler.

output_quality_checks.consistency_final_check: All 5 applicable checkpoints are MATCH. No MISMATCH found. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL and no blocking issues.
